center.name: Northern Australia
center.summary: Northern Australia是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Forest kingfisher、Mangrove robin、彩火尾雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Indonesia, New Guinea and coastal eastern and Northern Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bird is found in the Northern Australia region and the island of New Guinea, within the countries of Australia, Indonesia, and Papua New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The painted finch is found in arid and semi-arid zones, in rocky areas with a ground cover of spinifex grass. The painted finch can be found in Western Australia, Northern Australia, Queensland and South Australia {{cite journal|last1=Holmes|first1=G|last2=Noske|first2=R
